x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Service catalog items represent fulfillment workflows that AI Agents can automate end-to-end. A healthy catalog volume maximizes the impact of Now Assist for Creator in generating and optimizing catalog items and fulfillment flows.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Ensure service catalog items are managed in ServiceNow to unlock AI generation capabilities.
